title: CREATE ADMIN
body: Set the gateway admin. Superuser for both the web UI and Designer. There is no "forgot password" without editing config files.
code:
Username: admin (or your choice)
Password: [strong password]

This account can:
  - Access the gateway web UI
  - Open Designer
  - Configure everything
  - Run gateway scripts

Store this credential securely.
No password reset without file editing.
key: This is the ONLY admin account initially
No password reset UI — you edit gateway.xml
This user has full gateway access
mistakes: Forgetting the password with no recovery plan
Not creating a separate operator account later
